license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z4jf8un
title: Hydra Medium 4.0
author: Rob Steele

steps_raw.instruction: Fill Nalgene tank with 100 liters of high purity water (Nanopure, MilliQ, or equivalent). The volume markings on the side of the tank are accurate enough for determining how much water you have added.
Add sodium bicarbonate 4.2 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add potassium chloride 0.22 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add anhydrous magnesium sulfate 3.97 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add calcium chloride dihydrate 14.7 g Mix well with plastic paddle
